name: Italian Sausage & Peppers in Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Hot and Mild Italian Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the casings from the sausages.
2. In a Dutch oven, brown the sausages.
3. Slice the sausages into 1/4-inch slices.
4. Add the Ragu sauce to the pot.
5. Remove the stems and seeds from the bell peppers.
6. Cook the peppers for 10 minutes on high setting in the microwave or add them directly to the pot if you plan on letting the mixture simmer before serving.
7. Add mushrooms, peppers, garlic, onion, salt, and pepper.
8. Heat the mixture over low heat and let it simmer until ready to serve.
9. About 15 minutes before serving, boil water in a large pot for al dente pasta.
10. When ready, add the cooked and drained pasta to the sausage and pepper mixture and enjoy.
This is a great way to have sausage and peppers during winter when peppers are more expensive than in summer, as it uses fewer ingredients than "Italian Sausage With Green Peppers And Mushrooms".
